glosses.es: auxiliar de vuelo; camarero de barco
glosses.it: assistente di volo; cameriere di bordo
glosses.yue: 空中服務員; 船艙服務員
glosses.pt: comissário de bordo; camareiro de navio
glosses.vi: tiếp viên hàng không; tiếp viên tàu biển
glosses.hi: विमान परिचारक; जहाज़ पर केबिन परिचारक
glosses.ro: însoțitor de bord; camerist pe navă
glosses.ja: 客室乗務員; 客室係（船）

translations.en: The flight attendant brings me water.
translations.es: El auxiliar de vuelo me trae agua.
translations.zh-Hans: 乘务员给我送来一杯水。
translations.pt: O comissário de bordo me traz água.
translations.vi: Tiếp viên mang cho tôi một cốc nước.
translations.hi: एयर होस्ट मुझे पानी लाता है.
translations.sv: Flygvärden kommer med vatten till mig.
translations.ro: Însoțitorul de bord îmi aduce apă.
translations.da: Stewarden kommer med vand til mig.
translations.ja: 客室乗務員が水を持ってきてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; marks the subject noun phrase and agrees with 'Steward'.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite lexical verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Personal pronoun; dative, 1st person singular; indirect object (recipient).
Neuter noun; accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'bringt'.

sentences.target: Ich frage den Steward nach einer Decke.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfraːɡə deːn ˈstjuːɐt naːx ˈaɪ̯nɐ ˈdɛkə/

translations.de: Ich frage den Steward nach einer Decke.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfraːɡə deːn ˈstjuːɐt naːx ˈaɪ̯nɐ ˈdɛkə/
translations.en: I ask the flight attendant for a blanket.
translations.es: Le pido al auxiliar de vuelo una manta.
translations.fr: Je demande une couverture au steward.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向乘务员要一条毯子。
translations.pt: Eu peço um cobertor ao comissário de bordo.
translations.vi: Tôi xin tiếp viên một cái chăn.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de steward om een deken.
translations.hi: मैं एयर होस्ट से एक कंबल मांगता हूँ.
translations.el: Ζητάω μια κουβέρτα από τον αεροσυνοδό.
translations.nb: Jeg ber flyverten om et teppe.
translations.sv: Jag ber flygvärden om en filt.
translations.ro: Îi cer o pătură însoțitorului de bord.
translations.da: Jeg beder stewarden om et tæppe.
translations.ja: 客室乗務員に毛布を頼みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative, 1st person singular; subject.
Finite lexical verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a PP meaning 'for' (fragen nach + Dat).
Indefinite article; dative feminine singular; within the PP headed by 'nach'.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Der Steward lächelt und hilft der Frau.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈstjuːɐt ˈlɛçəlt ʊnt hɪlft deːɐ̯ fʁaʊ̯/

translations.de: Der Steward lächelt und hilft der Frau.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈstjuːɐt ˈlɛçəlt ʊnt hɪlft deːɐ̯ fʁaʊ̯/
translations.en: The flight attendant smiles and helps the woman.
translations.es: El auxiliar de vuelo sonríe y ayuda a la mujer.
translations.fr: Le steward sourit et aide la femme.
translations.it: Lo steward sorride e aiuta la donna.
translations.zh-Hans: 乘务员微笑着帮助那位女士。
translations.pt: O comissário de bordo sorri e ajuda a mulher.
translations.tr: Kabin görevlisi gülümseyip kadına yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Tiếp viên mỉm cười và giúp người phụ nữ.
translations.nl: De steward glimlacht en helpt de vrouw.
translations.hu: A légiutas-kísérő mosolyog és segít a nőnek.
translations.hi: एयर होस्ट मुस्कुराकर महिला की मदद करता है.
translations.pl: Steward się uśmiecha i pomaga kobiecie.
translations.el: Ο αεροσυνοδός χαμογελά και βοηθά τη γυναίκα.
translations.id: Pramugara tersenyum dan membantu wanita itu.
translations.ro: Însoțitorul de bord zâmbește și o ajută pe femeie.
translations.cs: Stevard se usměje a pomůže ženě.
translations.ja: 客室乗務員が微笑んで女性を手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite lexical verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; first predicate.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicates sharing the same subject.
Finite lexical verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; second predicate; 'helfen' selects a dative object.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; marks the indirect object NP.
Common noun; feminine singular; indirect object (recipient) of 'hilft'.

sentences.target: Wir sprechen kurz mit dem Steward.

translations.de: Wir sprechen kurz mit dem Steward.
translations.en: We talk briefly with the flight attendant.
translations.es: Hablamos un momento con el auxiliar de vuelo.
translations.fr: Nous parlons brièvement avec le steward.
translations.it: Parliamo un momento con lo steward.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们和乘务员简短聊了几句。
translations.pt: Conversamos rapidamente com o comissário de bordo.
translations.tr: Kabin görevlisiyle kısa bir süre konuşuyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nói chuyện với tiếp viên một chút.
translations.nl: We praten kort met de steward.
translations.hi: हम एयर होस्ट से थोड़ी देर बात करते हैं.
translations.ro: Vorbim pe scurt cu însoțitorul de bord.
translations.ja: 私たちは客室乗務員と少し話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative, 1st person plural; subject.
